title: Nephrodium kanakorum
taxonomy: Nephrodium kanakorum belongs to the family Matoniaceae, an ancient group of ferns. This species is part of the genus Nephrodium, which is now often classified under the genus Matonia or as a synonym. The classification of Nephrodium kanakorum is further categorized as a member of the class Polypodiopsida, a group of vascular plants that includes ferns and their allies. The class Polypodiopsida is part of the division Pteridophyta, which includes all vascular plants with non-woody stems. This classification reflects the complex and evolving understanding of plant relationships.
